# Akash Mahajan

> Founder of Kloudle and Appsecco. Security practitioner and builder. Creating cloud security tools, AI agents, and open-source projects.

Akash Mahajan runs two security companies and maintains over a dozen open-source projects focused on cloud security, AI agent tooling, and security education. Based in India.

For full context including all project descriptions, see [llms-full.txt](https://akashm.dev/llms-full.txt).

## Links

- [About](https://akashm.dev/about): Background, philosophy, and contact links
- [Now](https://akashm.dev/now): What Akash is currently focused on
- [Projects JSON](https://akashm.dev/api/projects.json): Machine-readable project data
- [Kloudle](https://kloudle.com): Cloud security posture management for the agent era
- [Appsecco](https://appsecco.com): Application security consulting and training

## Projects

- [Kloudle Scan](https://github.com/Kloudle/kloudle-scan): Open-source cloud security posture scanning
- [Web Security Scanner AI Agent](https://github.com/appsecco/appsecco-web-security-scanner-ai-agent): AI-assisted web application security scanner
- [AI Security Knowledge Base](https://github.com/appsecco/appsecco-ai-security-kb): Structured methodologies for AI and appsec testing
- [Pentester to AI Red Teamer](https://github.com/appsecco/pentester-to-ai-red-teamer): Training for pentesters transitioning to AI red teaming
- [SPA Hacker Agent](https://github.com/makash/spa-hacking-agent): Agent-driven SPA security scanner
- [ccrank.dev](https://github.com/makash/claude-leaderboard-using-ccusage): Claude Code usage leaderboard and analytics

## Optional

- [clawdwa](https://github.com/makash/clawdwa): Claude from WhatsApp groups
- [Learn Claude Code Workbook](https://github.com/makash/learn-claude-code): Hands-on Claude Code guides
- [Great Web Copy](https://github.com/makash/great-web-copy): Claude Code plugin for website copy
- [PMF Plugin](https://github.com/makash/pmf-plugin): Product-market-fit validation toolkit
- [Cloud Security List](https://github.com/makash/cloud-security-list): Curated cloud security resources
- [Learn Kannada Alphabet](https://github.com/makash/learn-kannada-alphabet-for-kids): Educational PWA for Kannada
- [Scam Calls India](https://github.com/makash/scam-calls-india): Scam call pattern awareness
- [OpenClaw Secure Setup](https://github.com/makash/getbot-secure-openclaw): Security hardening for OpenClaw
